name: mind
description: CommitMind for OpenAI Codex CLI — deterministic memory, code-intel, and task workflows via skills + MCP. Install hooks with `commitmind codex install`. Requires the commitmind CLI installed and authenticated.

interface.longDescription: CommitMind gives Codex deterministic project memory, indexed code navigation (xref), and task/playbook workflows — surfaced automatically through hooks and MCP tools.
defaultPrompt: what can you do with CommitMind?
